title: The Leonardo Collection Mackintosh Butter Dish by Charles Rennie Mackintosh | Elegant Ceramic Covered Butter Dish with Art Nouveau Design | Perfect for Everyday Use or Display | Timeless Home Décor
features: Art Nouveau-Inspired Mackintosh Design: Featuring the iconic design by Charles Rennie Mackintosh, this butter dish adds an elegant, artistic touch to your kitchen with its timeless Art Nouveau floral motifs.

High-Quality Ceramic Construction: Made from durable ceramic, this butter dish is built to last while maintaining its delicate, artistic appearance, making it both practical and aesthetically pleasing.

Ideal for Storing Butter Neatly: Designed to keep butter fresh and tidy, this covered dish is perfect for everyday use, ensuring that your butter stays clean and easy to serve at any meal or gathering.

Charming Centrepiece for Kitchen or Dining: The elegant Mackintosh design makes this butter dish a perfect decorative piece for any kitchen, dining area, or display shelf, adding sophistication to your home décor.

Great Gift for Art and Design Lovers: A thoughtful gift for fans of Charles Rennie Mackintosh’s work or anyone who appreciates high-quality, decorative homeware, perfect for birthdays, housewarmings, or special occasions.
